synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-0438 Oracle Linux 9 openssl bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0438
description:
[3.5.1-5.0.1]
- Enable openssl-fips-provider dependency [Orabug: 36504822]
- Temporary disable openssl-fips-provider dependency [Orabug: 36504822]
- Replace upstream references [Orabug: 34340177]

[3.5.1.openela.0.1]
- Add OpenELA specific changes

[1:3.5.1-5]
- Do not make key share choice in tls1_set_groups()
  Resolves: RHEL-131010
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0438

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0438.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
openssl-3.5.1-5.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
openssl-devel-3.5.1-5.0.1.el9_7.i686.rpm
openssl-devel-3.5.1-5.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
openssl-libs-3.5.1-5.0.1.el9_7.i686.rpm
openssl-libs-3.5.1-5.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
openssl-perl-3.5.1-5.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
openssl-3.5.1-5.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
openssl-devel-3.5.1-5.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
openssl-libs-3.5.1-5.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
openssl-perl-3.5.1-5.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/openssl-3.5.1-5.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[3.5.1-5.0.1]
- Enable openssl-fips-provider dependency [Orabug: 36504822]
- Temporary disable openssl-fips-provider dependency [Orabug: 36504822]
- Replace upstream references [Orabug: 34340177]

[3.5.1.openela.0.1]
- Add OpenELA specific changes

[1:3.5.1-5]
- Do not make key share choice in tls1_set_groups()
  Resolves: RHEL-131010
